biologic_status.name: Stelara
biologic_status.reasoning: The patient explicitly states, "Switched to biologic that could treat both conditions. Started Stelara."

treatment_journey.name: antispasmodics
treatment_journey.evidence: First GI saw said IBS, gave me antispasmodics. Useless.

treatment_journey.name: methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Already on methotrexate for psoriasis, doctor hoped would help Crohn's too. Didn't.

treatment_journey.name: sulfasalazine
treatment_journey.evidence: Added sulfasalazine, allergic reaction. Hives everywhere. Miserable.

treatment_journey.name: Stelara
treatment_journey.evidence: Started Stelara. ... Stelara helping both conditions somewhat.

pathway_endpoint.reasoning: Switched to biologic that could treat both conditions. Started Stelara.

referral_pathway.name: General Practitioner
referral_pathway.evidence: First GI saw said IBS, gave me antispasmodics.

referral_pathway.name: Gastroenterologist
referral_pathway.evidence: Second opinion led to proper testing. Colonoscopy showed patchy inflammation throughout. Classic Crohn's.
